title: IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies family as a Credit Analyst in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies!
